name: flashvis
description: Watch real flash filesystems work: FS-to-WASM over an emulated NOR chip.

scripts.build: npm run build:fastffs && npm run build:littlefs && npm run build:spiffs && npm run build:jesfs && npm run build:fatfs
scripts.test: npm run test:fastffs && npm run test:integrity && npm run test:console && npm run test:playgroundboot && npm run test:littlefs && npm run test:littlefs-integrity && npm run test:spiffs && npm run test:spiffs-integrity && npm run test:jesfs && npm run test:jesfs-integrity && npm run test:fatfs && npm run test:fatfs-integrity && npm run test:fatfs-render && npm run test:realsmoke && npm run test:bootformat && npm run test:concurrency && npm run test:coordwire && npm run test:commanderror && npm run test:tapeleak && npm run test:vizframe && npm run test:workerconformance && npm run test:opcount && npm run test:sessionworker
